context: Name of the to be translated language
Status will be checked or unchecked
TTS spoken word for image types
%s will be replaced with the title of the screen (Example: Library Screen)
This is numbering, which number out of the total number of objects is available for interaction. Example: 1 of 3
Used for on-screen gamepad helpers (eg. "Y Button : Change User")
Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.
Single quotes (') are there for emphasis on the sound of the letters that will be spoken.
Pronunciation for a period inside of a URL, as in "www dot microsoft dot com"
This is the name of the popup that appears when a player gets a notification for a game invite or achievement unlocked

source_string: On your device, screen reader support is enabled by default.
translation: V vaši napravi je podpora za bralnik zaslona privzeto omogočena.

source_string: We've detected that your system has a screen reader enabled and have automatically enabled Minecraft's screen reader.
translation: Zaznali smo, da ima vaš sistem omogočen bralnik zaslona, ​​in samodejno omogočili bralnik zaslona Minecraft.

source_string: Touch and drag to find controls on the screen, and double tap controls to select. To scroll on a screen, double tap and hold while swiping up or down.
translation: Dotaknite se in povlecite, da poiščete kontrolnike na zaslonu, in dvakrat pritisnite, da jih izberete. Za pomikanje po zaslonu se dvakrat dotaknite in pridržite, medtem ko povlečete gor ali dol.

source_string: We've detected that your account has "Let games read to me" enabled and have automatically enabled Minecraft's screen reader.
translation: Zaznali smo, da ima vaš račun omogočeno "Dovoli igram, da mi berejo" in smo samodejno vklopili Minecraftov bralnik zaslona.

source_string: Would you like to turn this off?

translation: Izberi tipko, da jo vežeš na %s

context: right square bracket means ']' on the english keyboard

source_string: No emote assigned to this button, press %s the Change Emotes button
translation: Noben čustveni simbol dodeljen na ta gumb, pritisni %s gumb Zamenjaj čustvene simbole

source_string: Press right or left to cycle through emote buttons. Press the down arrow to access the Change Emotes button.
translation: Pritisni levo ali desno za menjavo med gumbi s čustvenimi simboli. Pritisni puščico navzdol za dostop do gumba Zamenjaj čustvene simbole.

source_string: Do you want to sign out and switch accounts?
translation: Se želiš odjaviti in menjati račune?

source_string: Power a furnace with a kelp block
translation: Kuri kocko posušene trave v peči

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
Build some bookshelves to improve your enchantment table
translation: Zgradi knjižne police, da izboljšaš čarobno mizo

source_string: Construct a furnace out of eight stone blocks
translation: Ustvari peč iz osmih kamnitih kock

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a hoe
translation: Uporabi deske in palice, da narediš motiko

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a pickaxe
translation: Uporabi deske in palice, da narediš kramp

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a sword
translation: Uporabi deske in palice, da narediš meč

source_string: Craft a workbench with four blocks of planks
translation: Ustvari delovno mizo s štirimi deskami

source_string: Acquire diamonds with your iron tools
translation: Pridobi diamante s svojim železnim orodjem

source_string: Use a book, obsidian and diamonds to construct an enchantment table
translation: Uporabi knjigo, vulkanski kamen in diamante, da ustvariš čarobno mizo

source_string: Fly a pig off a cliff
Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
Attack a tree until a block of wood pops out
translation: Napadaj drevo dokler ne pade kock lesa iz njega

source_string: Travel by minecart at least 1 km from where you started
translation: Potuj z minecraft vsaj 1 km od tam kjer si začel

source_string: Deal nine hearts of damage in a single hit
translation: Zadaj devet src škode v enem udarcu

source_string: Build a portal to the Nether
Kill a skeleton with an arrow from more than 50 meters
translation: Ubij okostnjaka s puščico iz več kot 50 metrov

source_string: Tap jump to exit the boat
translation: Pritisnite skok za izstop iz čolna

source_string: Tap jump to exit the minecart
translation: Pritisnite skok za izhod iz minecarta

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Moraš biti operator v ustvarjalnem načinu

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Ukazne kocke niso omogočene na tem strežniku

source_string: Your worlds are not getting saved properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Vaši svetovi se ne shranjujejo kot bi se morali. Mogoče ne bodo več tu ko boste naslednjič igrali Minecraft. Pojdite v nastavitve na vašem Apple TV in vključite iCloud da poskrbite da se vsi vaši svetovi shranijo.

source_string: You do not have enough iCloud space free to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Free up space on your iCloud account to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Nimate dovolj prostora v iCloudu, da bi lahko pravilno shranili svoje svetove. Ko jih boste naslednjič igrali Minecraft, jih morda ne bo več. Sprostite prostor v svojem računu iCloud in se prepričajte, da so rešeni vsi vaši svetovi.

source_string: You need an internet connection to save your worlds properly. They might not be here next time you play Minecraft. Reconnect to the internet to make sure all of your worlds get saved.
translation: Za pravilno reševanje svojih svetov potrebujete internetno povezavo. Ko jih boste naslednjič igrali Minecraft, jih morda ne bo več. Znova se povežite z internetom in se prepričajte, da so vsi vaši sveti rešeni.

source_string: You need to be signed in to iCloud to play Minecraft. Go to your Apple TV settings and turn on iCloud.
translation: Če želite igrati Minecraft, morate biti prijavljeni v iCloud. Odprite nastavitve Apple TV in vklopite iCloud.

source_string: A new iCloud account has signed in. You will need to restart Minecraft to play.
translation: Nov iCould račun je bil vpisan. Minecraft boste morali ponovno prižgati za igranje.

source_string: Minecraft wants to access your local network. This allows you and others on your local network to play together. Declining this permission does not affect online features or gameplay. But will prevent you and others, on the same network, from playing together.
translation: Minecraft želi dostopati do vašega lokalnega omrežja. To vam in drugim v vašem lokalnem omrežju omogoča skupno igranje. Če to dovoljenje zavrnete, to ne vpliva na spletne funkcije ali igranje, vendar bo preprečilo, da bi vi in drugi v istem omrežju igrali skupaj.

source_string: To view attributions, please visit https://minecraft.net/attribution in any web browser.
translation: Za ogled pripisov obiščite stran https://minecraft.net/attribution v katerem koli brskalniku.

source_string: We're sorry, but this lesson is not currently available.
translation: Žal nam je, vendar ta lekcija trenutno ni na voljo.

source_string: Sign in with a different account

context: Translations should be 20 characters or less

source_string: We can't connect to the service you need right now. Please check your internet connection and try again.
translation: Trenutno se ne moremo povezati s storitvijo, ki jo potrebujete. Preverite internetno povezavo in poskusite znova.

source_string: Another device has logged in using your account.
translation: Z vašim računom se je prijavila druga naprava.

source_string: If you are not an education user, go to the app store to download the standard version.
translation: Če niste izobraževalni uporabnik, pojdite v app store, da si prenesete standardno verzijo.

source_string: Sign In with a Different Account
Sorry, we were unable to complete your purchase. Maybe check your internet connection?
translation: Vašega nakupa žal nismo mogli dokončati. Mogoče preverite svojo internetno povezavo?

source_string: There's something wrong with your account info. Please sign in again to continue using multiplayer features.
translation: Z vašimi podatki o računu je nekaj narobe. Prosimo, da se znova prijavite, da boste lahko še naprej uporabljali večigralske funkcije.

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Opomba! Ko podpišeš knjigo, je ne boš moral več urejati.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Minimum height for building is %s blocks
translation: Najmanjša višina za grajenje je %s kock

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Ali si prepričan, da želiš odpreti naslednjo spletno stran?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Ali želiš odpreti to povezavo ali kopirati v odložišče?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Nikoli ne odpiraj povezav ljudi, ki jim ne zaupaš!

source_string: This Realm has chat filtering turned off.
translation: Ta Realm ima filtriranje pogovora izklopljeno.

source_string: You have been temporarily renamed to '%s' on this server
translation: Začasno ste bili preimenovani v %s na tem strežniku
Sposobnost ki se imenuje '%1$s' ne obstaja

source_string: The '%1$s' ability has been granted to you
Cannot issue command, Agent is out of range
translation: Ukaza ni mogoče izvesti, Agent je izven dosega
Doda IP naslov na seznam izključenih.

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Neveljaven IP naslov ali neznan igralec

source_string: There are %1$d total banned IP addresses:
translation: Tukaj je %1$d skupno izgnanih IP naslovov:

source_string: Modifies the data tag of a block.
The data tag did not change: %1$s
The target block is not a data holder block
Cannot change block outside of the world
translation: Kocke zunaj sveta ni mogoče spremeniti.

source_string: '%1$s' is not a valid Block State.
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Prilagojeni bossbar %s trenutno nima online igralcev

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
Attempt to launch and connect to Classroom Mode.
translation: Poskus za začetek in povezavo z razrednim načinom.

source_string: Could not clear the inventory of %1$s
translation: Ni bilo mogoče počistiti inventarja od %1$s

source_string: Could not clear the inventory of %1$s, no items to remove
translation: Ni bilo mogoče odstraniti elementov od %1$s ni elementov za odstranitev
Odstrani vse fiksne prostore v inventarju.

source_string: Clones blocks from one region to another.
translation: Kloniraj kocke iz ene regije v drugo.

source_string: Filtered usage requires a filter block to be specified
translation: Filtrirana uporaba potrebuje filtrirno kock da bo specificirana

source_string: Too many blocks in the specified area (%1$d > %2$d)
Closes websocket connection if there is one.
translation: Prekine povezave s spletnimi vtičnicami ce obstajajo.

source_string: Too many blocks in the specified area (%1$d > %2$d)
Locks and unlocks the day-night cycle.
Starts or stops a debugging session.
Revokes operator status from a player.
Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
Opens NPC dialogue for a player.
Failed to change the scene for the NPC.
Dialogue successfully changed the scene for the NPC globally.
translation: Dialog je uspešno spremenil sceno za NPC globalno.

source_string: Dialogue successfully changed NPC text just for %1$s.
translation: Dialog je uspešno spremenil NPC besedilo samo za %1$s.
Sklicevalo se je na neveljavno sceno.

source_string: Selected actor did not have an NPC component.
translation: Izbrani igralec ni imel NPC komponente.

source_string: An NPC was found, but was not in the receiving player %1$s's ticking range.
translation: NPC je bil najden, vendar ni v območju tikanja prejemnega igralca %1$s.

source_string: Selector for NPCs was ambiguous and resulted in too many selected. Please select only one NPC.
translation: Selektor za NPC je bil nejasen in je vodil do prevelike izbire. Prosim izberite samo en NPC.

source_string: Couldn't take %1$s from %2$s as they do not have the effect
translation: Ni bilo mogoče odvzeti %1$s od %2$s, saj nimajo tega efekta.

source_string: Couldn't take any effects from %1$s as they do not have any
translation: Ni bilo mogoče odvzeti kateregakoli efekta od %1$s, saj nimajo nobenega.

source_string: There is no such mob effect with ID %s
translation: Ni nobenega efekta bitja z IDjem %s

source_string: The selected enchantment can't be added to the target item: %1$s
translation: Izbrane čarovnije ni mogoče dodati ciljni točki: %1$s

source_string: Adds an enchantment to a player's selected item.
The target doesn't hold an item: %1$s
There is no such enchantment with ID %1$d
Modifies the data tag of an entity.
The data tag did not change: %1$s
%1$s is a player and cannot be changed
translation: %1$s je igralec in ne more biti spremenjen

source_string: Triggers an event for the specified object(s)

translation: Ime dogodka ne sme biti prazno.

context: 1: Event Name, 2: List of failed entities for which the event could not be executed

source_string: Executes a command on behalf of one or more entities.
translation: Izvede ukaz v imenu enega ali več entitet.

source_string: Fills all or parts of a region with a specific block.
translation: Zapolni vse ali dele regije z določenimi kockami.

source_string: Cannot place blocks outside of the world
translation: Kocke zunaj sveta ni mogoče postaviti

source_string: Too many blocks in the specified area (%1$d > %2$d)
Invalid replace data value for block %1$s
translation: Neveljavna zamenjava podatkovne vrednosti za kocko %1$s

source_string: Add or remove fog settings file
translation: Dodaj ali odstrani datoteko z nastavitvami megle

source_string: No fog settings with the id were found for %1$s
translation: Megle z idjem  ni bilo najdene za %1$s

source_string: Size limit reached for fog identifiers for %1$s
translation: Omejitev velikosti dosežena za meglin identifikator %1$s

source_string: Last pushed fog setting with id %2$s was successfully removed from %1$s
translation: Nazadnje potisnjena nastavitev megle z idjem %2$s je bila uspešno odstranjena od %1$s

source_string: Fog setting was successfully added for %1$s with id %2$s
translation: Nastavitev megle je bila uspešno dodana za %1$s z idjem %2$s

source_string: Fog settings with id %2$s were successfully removed from %1$s
translation: Nastavitev megle z idjem %2$s je bila uspešno odstranjena od %1$s

source_string: Runs commands found in the corresponding function file.
translation: Zažene ukaze najdene v pripadajoči fukncijski datoteki.

source_string: Function with title '%s' is invalid, character '%s' is not allowed in function names.
translation: Funkcija z naslovom '%s' je neveljavna, znak '%s' ni dovoljen v imenih funkcij.

source_string: Function %s could not be run. You must specify a min_engine_version in the behavior pack's manifest.json.
translation: Funkcijo %s ni bilo mogoče zagnati. Podati moraš min_engine_version v manifest.json v paketu obnašanja.

source_string: Sets or queries a game rule value.
translation: Nastavi ali poišči vrednost pravil igre.

source_string: Invalid type used for game rule '%1$s'
translation: Neveljaven tip se uporablja za pravila igre '%1$s'

source_string: No game rule called '%1$s' is available
translation: Pravilo igre, imenovano '%1$s' ni na voljo

source_string: Game rule %1$s has been updated to %2$s
translation: Pravilo igre %1$s je bilo posodobljeno na %2$s

source_string: The number you have entered (%.2f) is too big, it must be at most %.2f
translation: Število ki ste ga vnesli (%.2f), je preveliko, največ mora biti %.2f

source_string: The number you have entered (%.2f) is too small, it must be at least %.2f
translation: Število, ki ste ga vnesli (%.2f) je premajhno, mora biti vsaj %.2f

source_string: Bad public key given. Expected 120 byte key after PEM formatting.
translation: Slab javni ključ. Pričakovan je 120 bajtni ključ po formatiranju PEM.

source_string: The number you have entered (%1$d) is too big, it must be at most %2$d
translation: Število ki ste ga vnesli (%1$d), je preveliko, največ mora biti %2$d

source_string: The number you have entered (%1$d) is too small, it must be at least %2$d
translation: Število, ki ste ga vnesli (%1$d) je premajhno, mora biti vsaj %2$d

source_string: There is no such block with name %1$d
Gives an item to a player.
Invalid command syntax: no such %s exists with that data value
translation: Neveljavna sintaksa ukaza: noben %s ne obstaja s to podatkovno vrednostjo

source_string: There is no such item with name %1$d
Could not make exploration map. Feature not found on this dimension
translation: Raziskovalnega zemljevida ni bilo mogoče izdelati. Funkcija ni bila najdena na tej dimenziji.

source_string: Tip: Use the <tab> key while typing a command to auto-complete the command or its arguments
translation: Nasvet: Uporabi tabulator med vnosom ukaza za avtomatsko končanje ukaza njegovih argumentov

source_string: Sets the immutable state of the world.

context: Board a boat / get on a horse
Movement from pushing joystick forward (or pressing W on keyboard)

source_string: Kicks a player from the server.
Removes a player from the game.
Please provide the name of the player you want to kick
translation: Prosim podaj ime igralca, katerega želiš odstraniti

source_string: You may not remove yourself from the game
translation: Ne moreš odstraniti samega sebe iz igre

source_string: The host may not be kicked from the game.
translation: Gostitelj ne more biti odstranjen iz igre.

source_string: Teachers may not be removed from the game.
translation: Učitelji ne morejo biti odstranjeni iz igre.

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
You can't send a private message to yourself!
translation: Samemu sebi ne moreš poslati zasebnega sporočila.

source_string: Controls what mob events are allowed to run.
translation: Določa, katere dogodke bitij se lahko izvaja.

source_string: Mob Events are now enabled. Individual events which are set to false will not run.
translation: Dogodki bitij so sedaj omogočeni. Posamezni dogodki, ki so postavljeni na false se ne bodo izvedli.

source_string: Mob Events are now disabled. Individual events will not run.
translation: Dogodki bitij so sedaj onemogočeni. Posamezni dogodki se ne bodo izvedli.

source_string: Mob Events are enabled. Individual events which are set to false will not run.
translation: Dogodki bitij so omogočeni. Posamezni dogodki, ki so postavljeni na false se ne bodo izvedli.

source_string: Mob Events are disabled. Individual events will not run.
translation: Dogodki bitij so onemogočeni. Posamezni dogodki se ne bodo izvedli.
Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na true

source_string: Mob Event %s (id: %s) set to true, but Mob Events are disabled.
translation: Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na true, ampak dogodki bitij so onemogočeni.
Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na false

source_string: Mob Event %s (id: %s) is set to true.
translation: Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na true

source_string: Mob Event %s (id: %s) is set to true, but Mob Events are disabled.
translation: Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na true, ampak dogodki bitij so onemogočeni.

source_string: Mob Event %s (id: %s) is set to false.
translation: Dogodek bitij %s (id: %s) je postavljen na false

source_string: Allows you to control playing music tracks.
translation: Omogoča ti upravljanje predvajanja glasbenih posnetkov.

source_string: You must provide a non-empty track name.
translation: Podati moraš ime posnetka, ki ni prazno.

source_string: %s has been queued to start playing.
translation: %s je bil postavljen v čakalno vrsto za začetek predvajanja.

source_string: Grants operator status to a player.
Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nobenih sprememb, igralec je že operator
Ponovno naloži in uporabi Op dovoljenja.
Vklopi koordinate za vklop / izklop igralca.

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard
Sets or gets the paused state of the game for all players.
translation: Nastavi ali pridobi pavzirano stanje igre za vse igralce.
Mesto ponovnega življenja nastavljeno na %s, %s, %s za %s igralcev

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Tarča bodisi že ima to oznako ali ima preveč oznak

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Get tenant ID and host status. Intended for CM.
translation: Pridobite ID najemnika in status gostitelja. Namenjen CM.

source_string: Failed to connect to the server

translation: nastavitve in tega ni mogoče razveljaviti.

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Lahko pa uporabiš že vnaprej narejene!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Želiš deliti svoje nastavitve z nekom? Uporabi spodnje polje!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: %1$s je bil zmečkan pod padajočim nakovalom

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s je stopil na kaktus, ko je poskušal pobegniti %2$s
%1$s je utopil, ko je poskušal pobegniti %2$s
%1$s je skočil s prevelike višine in se polomil

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: %1$s je bil zmečkan pod padajočo kocko
%1$s je stopil v ogenj, med bojem z %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s je poskušal plavati po lavi, v upanju da bi ušel %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s

translation: %1$s je bil ubit, ko je poskušal poškodovati %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite

translation: %1$s je bil od %2$s usojen da pade

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s je bil od %2$s z %3$s usojen da pade

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s je padel pregloboko in pri tem ga je skoraj pokončal %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s je padel pregloboko in pri tem ga je %2$s skoraj pokončal z %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Ali si prepričan, da želiš končati?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Preizkusna različica bo trajala pet dni v igri. Daj vse od sebe!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Peti dan je potekel. Pritisni %s, da shraniš zaslonsko sliko svoje stvaritve.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Preizkusna različica bo trajala 5 dni v igri (približno 1 uro in 40 minut pravega časa). Preveri dosežke za namige. Uživaj!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Uporabi %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s ter miško za premikanje naokoli

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Čas preizkusne različice je potekel. Kupi igro, da nadaljuješ ali začni nov svet!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Ali si prepričan, da želiš zakleniti težavnost tega sveta? To bo ta svet za vedno nastavilo na %1$s in tega ne bo mogoče več spremeniti.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:
The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Preverjanje prisotnosti strižnikov je trenutno nedosegljivo. Prosimo poskusite kasnje.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: This server has already been added
translation: To strežnik je že bil dodan

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Si prepričan, da želiš odstraniti ta strežnik?

context: How To Play help text header. {MaxLength="80"}

source_string: Light Blue Per Bend Sinister Inverted
translation: Svetlo moder obnjen levo poševno sekani

source_string: When you see this icon, we are saving your game. Do not turn off your device while this icon is on screen.
translation: Ko vidite to ikono, mi shranjujemo vašo igro. Ne izklapljajte te naprave dokler je ta ikona na zaslonu.
